Overview

Royal China is a premium Cantonese restaurant chain famous for its hand-crafted Dim Sum and Peking Duck in cities like Mumbai and London.

The Bandra outpost — Pali Hill's most-loved address for a long-lunch — pairs traditional dim sum with an ambitious cocktail program and an interior of black lacquer, brass, and warm pendant light.

Recommended dishes

  1. 1.Peking Duck
  2. 2.Truffle Edamame Dumplings
  3. 3.Prawn Har Gao
  4. 4.Chilli Oil Wontons
  5. 5.Mango Pomelo Sago

Reviews (318)

Aanya Mehta
@aanya.mehta
★★★★★
2 Feb, 2026
Peking duck is unbeatable

Came here for an anniversary dinner and the team made it special — the staff brought out a small dessert with a candle and a hand-written card. The Peking Duck (full bird) was carved tableside and served with paper-thin pancakes that we kept ordering more of. Cocktails are creative but not gimmicky.

Food Ambience Service Value
RC
Royal China
Thank you, Aanya! Glad we could be a part of your anniversary. Looking forward to having you back soon.
Rohan Sharma
@rohan.sharma
★★★★★
28 Jan, 2026
Best dim sum in the city

The Truffle Edamame and Prawn Har Gao dumplings have been my staple here for years. Service is fast and the host remembers your usual order if you come often. It's pricey but worth it for a treat night.

Food Ambience Service Value
Priya Iyer
@priya.iyer
★★★★★
22 Jan, 2026
Great vibe, ok for a weeknight

The interiors are gorgeous — black, brass, and that famous moon-gate entrance. Food was good but the spice on the chilli chicken was inconsistent across two visits. Drinks are excellent.

Food Ambience Service Value
Kabir Sethi
@kabir.sethi
★★★★★
18 Jan, 2026
Lovely service, beautiful room

Booked a table for my parents and the staff handled everything with care. The room feels polished without being cold, and the prawn dumplings were the highlight of the meal.

Food Ambience Service Value
11 Likes
Meera Kapoor
@meera.kapoor
★★★★★
12 Jan, 2026
Great cocktails and a calm table

The bar team suggested a light citrus cocktail that paired perfectly with the dim sum. A little slow between courses, but the ambience made it easy to settle in.

Food Ambience Service Value
9 Likes
Nikhil Rao
@nikhil.rao
★★★★★
6 Jan, 2026
Worth planning ahead for

Friday night was packed, so the reservation mattered. We ordered the Peking Duck, chilli oil wontons, and jasmine tea. Every dish felt carefully timed.

Food Ambience Service Value
17 Likes
Sara Contractor
@sara.contractor
★★★★★
30 Dec, 2025
Elegant spot for dinner

The lighting, table spacing, and staff recommendations made the evening feel very considered. Dessert could be stronger, but the mains and starters were excellent.

Food Ambience Service Value
7 Likes
Arjun Malhotra
@arjun.malhotra
★★★★★
18 Dec, 2025
Consistent, polished, reliable

This is the place I keep coming back to when I want dinner to feel easy. The service is composed, the menu has enough range, and the dining room always looks sharp.

Food Ambience Service Value
6 Likes

Overview

Royal China is a premium Cantonese restaurant chain famous for its hand-crafted Dim Sum and Peking Duck in cities like Mumbai and London.

The Bandra outpost, Pali Hill's most-loved address for a long lunch, pairs traditional dim sum with an ambitious cocktail program and an interior of black lacquer, brass, and warm pendant light.

It is a polished special-occasion restaurant with attentive service, a calm dining room, and a menu built around classic Cantonese comfort.

Recommended dishes

  1. 1.Peking Duck
  2. 2.Prawn Har Gao
  3. 3.Truffle Edamame Dumplings
  4. 4.Chilli Garlic Noodles
  5. 5.Burnt Garlic Fried Rice
